title: Signed Corridor Robustness Matrix
strategies: terrain-default completion (trivial baseline): fill free cells with the +1-if-downstream / -1-if-upstream triangular pattern, then apply forced signs; scores ~0.1
single-start coordinate ascent: from the terrain-default matrix, flip each free entry that increases the exact |det| until a local optimum
deterministic multi-restart coordinate ascent: many seeded random +/-1 starts plus the default start, each hill-climbed on |det|, keep the best
algebraic near-Hadamard construction: seed with a Sylvester/conference-style +/-1 matrix, then repair the terrain-fixed cells and locally refine
scoring: exact |det| via integer Bareiss elimination, normalized to |det| of the terrain-default completion; trivial ~= 0.1, 10x-baseline robustness caps at 1.0; infeasible (entry not +/-1 or a violated forced link) -> 0.0
